1241.reason: [When the expected token is missing, the parser doesn't advance past the current token, which can cause infinite loops or cascading errors in subsequent parsing steps. The error handling should either skip tokens until a recovery point or properly advance the parser state.]

The error handling should either skip tokens until a recovery point or properly advance the parser state.]
